title: scrophularia frigida subsp. haussknechtii
intro: Scrophularia frigida subsp. haussknechtii, also known as the Haussknecht's figwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Scrophularia frigida subsp. haussknechtii is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
